title: Pool slot exhaustion
anchoring_context: Batch layer starved: no free slots in default_pool
description: Upstream sensor cleared but executor cannot schedule due to pool capacity
raw_logs:
[2026-05-09T08:00:01.000+0000] {scheduler_job_runner.py:123} INFO - Trying to schedule dbt_run_batch
[2026-05-09T08:00:02.050+0000] {scheduler_job_runner.py:456} WARNING - TaskInstance dbt_run_batch in dag mart_daily_dag cannot be scheduled: not enough open slots in pool default_pool (0/16)
[2026-05-09T08:00:05.200+0000] {taskinstance.py:2732} INFO - dag_id=mart_daily_dag, task_id=dbt_run_batch still queued: pool default_pool saturated by long-running spark_promote task
